Text:

Ref:
Ja sam hazla 

Cunami PBR THC geng vrti Sarajevo ooo 
Flo gros patroliram ЕЎeherom
Adrese stiЕҫem ko amazon 
Na licu osmijeh in da biznis zone
Na cosku s gengom iznad zuji dron
Lobe brado baro gori marlboro

Samo sport ooo ovo moj je sport uouuo 
Siempre pronto siempre pronto
Textil OG kush ganjamo plus
Zakucava kazaljka radijus
Ne mogu niЕЎta pa kazne nam piЕЎu
Evo na kafu pa odjebi U
(Hazla)

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

Od para suhe ruke tvrde od vratila
Ambicije biznisi price u kvadratima
Nista telefoni samo turska kupatila
Mala nam evropa jasemo ko Atila

Jangeri u spremi niko ne da na svoj blok
Cjevanicama punim hladno udara se ЕЎtok
Za desetoro brace mati sprema wok 
Nagazili ЕЎmekera podrum soba shock

Ljubav u mahali drama scenario
Rumeni obrazi al nije kardio

Sudbina takva keЕЎ ДҮemo duplat
Kurve se Еҫale da neДҮe se udat
Dobrom se robom ko sefte lupat
Oprat keЕЎovinu korov poДҚupat

Ref:
Ja sam hazla


в„— Cunami Flo

snippet.description:
Kontroverzni biznismen NebojЕЎa TubiДҮ ЕҪabac ovonedeljni je gost emisiji "Sceniranje" na Kurir televiziji. 
ЕҪabac je poznat kao ДҚovek sa beogradskog asfalta, jedan je od poslednjih preЕҫivelih aktera mraДҚnih devedesetih godina. On je poznavao gotovo sve ljude ДҚija su se imena u to vreme povezivala sa podzemljem.
Pre devet godina greЕЎkom je upucan u jednom lokalu u Novom Sadu, ali je preЕҫiveo i kao takav uЕЎao u Ginisovu knjigu rekorda.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Ko su Veljko Belivuk i ДҚlanovi njegove kriminalne grupe
snippet.description:
Policija u Srbiji nastavlja prikupljati dokaze protiv, kako su naveli, organizovane kriminalne grupe koju je predvodio jedan od voД‘a navijaДҚa nogometnog kluba Partizan Veljko Belivuk.

Grupa od 19 osoba na ДҚelu s Belivukom uhapЕЎena je juДҚe pod optuЕҫbama da su poДҚinili teЕЎka kriviДҚna djela ubistva, otmice i trgovine drogom.

OdreД‘en im je pritvor od 48 sati.

snippet.title: Na buvljaku od igle do motorne pile
snippet.description:
NajveДҮi buvljak u Centralnoj Bosni nalazi se u Bugojnu u blizini stadiona Iskra. Pazarni dan je petkom pa smo danas posjetili ovu pijacu na kojoj se moЕҫe naДҮi gotovo sve od igle do motorne pile koju je vlasnik cijenio samo 100 KM. Na buvljak u Bugojnu dolaze trgovci raznom robom iz svih dijelova BiH. Kako je to danas izgledalo na ovoj velikoj pijaci raznom robom pogledajte u ovome video uratku.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:

snippet.title: РҡР°СҒСӮРёРҪРі Р·Р° С„РёР»РјСҒРәСғ СғР»РҫРіСғ Сғ СҲРәРҫР»Рё! | Р”РёР°РҪР° Сғ РұРҫСҖРұРё Р·Р° СғР»РҫРіСғ Сғ С„РёР»РјСғ
snippet.description:
РқРөРҫСҮРөРәРёРІР°РҪРҫ Р·Р° СҒРІРө, РҝРҫР·РҪР°СӮРё СҖРөРҙРёСӮРөСҷРё РҙРҫСӣРё СӣРө Сғ СҲРәРҫР»Сғ Сғ РәРҫСҳРҫСҳ Р”РёР°РҪР° СҒСӮСғРҙРёСҖР° РҙР° РұРё РёР·Р°РұСҖР°Р»Рё РҪР°СҳРұРҫСҷРө РіР»СғРјСҶРө Р·Р° СғР»РҫРіСғ Сғ С„РёР»РјСғ. РўРёРҪРөСҳСҹРөСҖРё СӣРө РјРҫСҖР°СӮРё РҙР° РҝРҫРәР°Р¶Сғ СҒРІРҫСҳРө РіР»СғРјР°СҮРәРө РІРөСҲСӮРёРҪРө, РҪР°РәРҫРҪ СҮРөРіР° РјРҫРіСғ РҙР° РҝСҖРөСғР·РјСғ СғР»РҫРіСғ Сғ С„РёР»РјСғ. РҡРҫ СҳРө РұРҫСҷРө РҝСҖРёРҝСҖРөРјСҷРөРҪ? Р”Р° Р»Рё Р”РёР°РҪР° Рё Р”РёРјР° РёРјР°СҳСғ РҝСҖРёР»РёРәСғ РҙР° РҝСҖРөСғР·РјСғ РіР»Р°РІРҪСғ СғР»РҫРіСғ? РҹРҫРіР»РөРҙР°СҳСӮРө Сғ РҫРІРҫСҳ СҒРөСҖРёСҳРё!
РҲРҫСҲ СҳРөРҙР°РҪ РІРёРҙРөРҫ:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o17XgklQbs8
РҹСҖРөСӮРҝР»Р°СӮРёСӮРө СҒРө РҪР° РәР°РҪР°Р»!рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘ҰвҖҚрҹ‘Ұ

hr.title: Diana i Dima bili su zakljuДҚani u ЕЎkoli! | Je li Dima kukavica?

snippet.description:
https://nova.rs/video/?ref=yt 
Potpredsednica Stranke slobode i pravde(SSP) Marinika TepiДҮ, izjavila je danas, na konferenciji za medije u prostorijama SSP, da su juДҚe svi videli koliko je Aleksandar VuДҚiДҚ zainteresovan da se u istrazi o klanu Belivuk ne saznaju njegovi tragovi i povezanost sa ovom kriminalnom grupom.

вҖңZbog toga je juДҚe poslao svoje juriЕЎnike, kad sam Еҫelela da dokaЕҫem tu najdirektniju vezu. JuДҚe smo se uverili da opozicioni politiДҚari ne mogu da govore ni na javnoj povrЕЎini. VuДҚiДҮeva diktatura je do te mere u progresiji da svaki opozicioni politiДҚar treba da strepi da li ДҮe on poslati svoje vikare i juriЕЎnikeвҖқ, rekla je ona.

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeвҖҷve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereвҖҷs what we created. ArenвҖҷt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letвҖҷs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youвҖҷll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 вҖ” How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 вҖ” DIY ring 

2:48 вҖ” Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 вҖ” DIY hair comb 

6:53 вҖ” Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 вҖ” DIY fake nails

snippet.title: ROMSKA PITA-Sto posto ukusnija od bureka!!Jednostavna i laka za pripremu da jednostavnije nemoЕҫe!!
snippet.description:
Pozdrav dragi prijatelji poЕЎtovane domaДҮice i domaДҮini.Za ljubitelje pita,sirnica,bureka jedan savrЕЎen recept.jednostavan i lak za pripremu a tako ukusno kao ni u jednoj pekari.Dovoljno je samo slediti detaljnu pripremu i uspeh je zagarantovan.Fil moЕҫete menjati po svom ukusu i ukusu svojih ukuДҮana.Pa hajde da krenemo sa receptom
SASTOJCI
600gr.braЕЎno T-400 glatko
2 kaЕЎiДҚice so
300-350ml.voda
100ml.ulje
150gr.mast.
300gr.sir
PeДҮi u zagrejanoj rerni na 220c/15-20min.
в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬
Hello dear friends, dear housewives and hosts. For lovers of pies, cheese, burek, one perfect recipe. Simple and easy to prepare and as tasty as in any bakery. Just follow the detailed preparation and success is guaranteed. You can change the filling to your liking and the taste of his family. So let's start with the recipe
INGREDIENTS
600gr.flour T-400 smooth
2 teaspoons are
300-350ml.voda
100ml.oil
150gr.mast.
300gr.sir
Bake in a preheated oven at 220c / 15-20min.
в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬
Ciao cari amici, care massaie e padroni di casa. Per gli amanti delle torte, dei formaggi, del burek, una ricetta perfetta. Semplice e facile da preparare e gustosa come in qualsiasi panetteria. Basta seguire la preparazione dettagliata e il successo ГЁ garantito. Puoi cambiare il ripieno a proprio piacimento e al gusto della sua famiglia, quindi partiamo dalla ricetta
INGREDIENTI
600gr. Farina T-400 liscia
2 cucchiaini sono
300-350ml.voda
100 ml. Di olio
150gr. Mast.
300gr.sir
Cuocere in forno preriscaldato a 220c / 15-20min.
в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬
Ahoj milГӯ priatelia, milГ© Еҫeny v domГЎcnosti a hostitelia. Pre milovnГӯkov kolГЎДҚov, syrov, burekov, jeden perfektnГҪ recept. JednoduchГЎ a ДҫahkГЎ prГӯprava a rovnako chutnГ© ako v kaЕҫdej pekГЎrni. StaДҚГӯ postupovaЕҘ podДҫa podrobnej prГӯpravy a Гәspech je zaruДҚenГҪ. Plnenie mГҙЕҫete zmeniЕҘ podДҫa vaЕЎich predstГЎv a vkusu jeho rodiny. TakЕҫe zaДҚnime s receptom
ZLOЕҪKY
600gr. MГәka T-400 hladkГЎ
2 lyЕҫiДҚky sГә
300-350ml.voda
100ml.olej
150gr.mast.
300 g.sir
PeДҚieme vo vyhriatej rГәre na 220c / 15-20min.
в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬
Р”РҫРұСҖРҫРіРҫ РІСҖРөРјРөРҪРё СҒСғСӮРҫРә РҙРҫСҖРҫРіРёРө РҙСҖСғР·СҢСҸ, РҙРҫСҖРҫРіРёРө С…РҫР·СҸР№РәРё Рё С…РҫР·СҸРөРІР°. Р”Р»СҸ Р»СҺРұРёСӮРөР»РөР№ РҝРёСҖРҫРіРҫРІ, СҒСӢСҖР°, РұСғСҖРөРәР° РҫРҙРёРҪ РёРҙРөР°Р»СҢРҪСӢР№ СҖРөСҶРөРҝСӮ. Р“РҫСӮРҫРІРёСӮСҒСҸ РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫ Рё Р»РөРіРәРҫ Рё СӮР°Рә Р¶Рө РІРәСғСҒРҪРҫ, РәР°Рә РІ Р»СҺРұРҫР№ РҝРөРәР°СҖРҪРө. РҹСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫ СҒР»РөРҙРёСӮРө Р·Р° РҝРҫРҙСҖРҫРұРҪСӢРј РҝСҖРёРіРҫСӮРҫРІР»РөРҪРёРөРј Рё СғСҒРҝРөС… РІР°Рј РҫРұРөСҒРҝРөСҮРөРҪ. Р’СӢ РјРҫР¶РөСӮРө РҝРҫРјРөРҪСҸСӮСҢ РҪР°СҮРёРҪРәСғ. РҝРҫ СҒРІРҫРөРјСғ РІРәСғСҒСғ Рё РІРәСғСҒСғ РөРіРҫ СҒРөРјСҢРё. РҳСӮР°Рә, РҪР°СҮРҪРөРј СҒ СҖРөСҶРөРҝСӮР°
РҳРқР“Р Р•Р”РҳР•РқРўР«
600РіСҖ. РңСғРәРё Рў-400 РіР»Р°РҙРәР°СҸ
2 СҮР°Р№РҪСӢРө Р»РҫР¶РәРё
300-350РјР».РІРҫРҙР°
100 РјР». РңР°СҒР»Р°
150РіСҖ. РңР°СҮСӮР°.
300РіСҖ. РЎСҚСҖ
Р’СӢРҝРөРәР°СӮСҢ РІ СҖР°Р·РҫРіСҖРөСӮРҫР№ РҙСғС…РҫРІРәРө РҝСҖРё 220 В° C / 15-20 РјРёРҪ.
в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.
